sector_summary: The sectors with medium confidence include Technology, Financials, Energy, Healthcare, Utilities, and Biotech. However, Financials, Energy, and Real Estate show conflicts between price momentum and news flow, indicating potential caution. Sectors to avoid include Consumer Staples, Industrials, and Consumer Discretionary due to their weak performance relative to the S&P 500.
